app.name: Button Break Wii Remote
app.long_description: A port of Button Break, the Homebrew app for Wii U.. but on the Wii! Chatelog: v0.1 First release 0.2 Added Nunchuk buttons.. more presses! v0.3 Added lines in between presses v0.4 Added the right Punctuation and changed Minus and Plus to Select and Start v0.5 Made 2 different apps - Wii Remote and Nunchuk because there was no way to just only use the wii remote in v0.2 to v0.4.
